# Implementation Plan: Share Voting Link After Create

**Branch**: `006-share-vote-link` | **Date**: 2026-03-16 | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/006-share-vote-link/spec.md`

**Note**: Generated by `/speckit.plan` on 2026-03-16.

## Summary

Enhance post-create confirmation for vote creation so creators receive two immediately usable links:
an absolute voting URL for participant sharing and a result URL for monitoring. Voting URL MUST be
generated from canonical `APP_URL` + created `voteId`, while existing token-based result URL behavior
remains unchanged. If required link metadata is incomplete, success UI is suppressed and a generic
share-link error message is displayed. Contract consistency is maintained between server action redirect
query parameters and create page search-param parsing.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5.x (strict mode)
**Primary Dependencies**: Next.js App Router, React 19, Supabase JS v2, Zod
**Storage**: Supabase Postgres with RLS; no schema change needed for this feature
**Testing**: Vitest (`tests/integration`, `tests/contract`, `tests/unit`)
**Target Platform**: Dockerized Linux for local/CI; Vercel-style runtime for app hosting
**Project Type**: Next.js full-stack web app (server actions + route handlers + App Router pages)
**Performance Goals**: Preserve existing create-vote UX responsiveness; no added network roundtrips
**Constraints**:
- Voting URL MUST be absolute and use `APP_URL` as canonical origin
- Result URL generation/expiration behavior MUST remain backward compatible
- Success state MUST be hidden when required link metadata is incomplete
- Existing validation and error behavior for create-vote MUST remain unchanged
**Scale/Scope**: Single post-create UX path (`/votes/create`) and its redirect query contract

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Checked before Phase 0 research. Re-evaluated after Phase 1 design.*

### Pre-Design Gate (Pass / Fail / Deferred)

| Gate | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| TypeScript Contract Gate (MANDATORY) | **PASS** | Redirect query contract includes `created`, `voteUrl`, `resultUrl`, `tokenExpiresAt`, and failure signaling. Parsing/usage is isolated to create page and server action. |
| Supabase Security Gate (MANDATORY) | **PASS** | No new table/RLS/policy change. No new privileged operation; links derived from existing create response payload. |
| Test Gate (MANDATORY) | **PASS** | Integration test for create action redirect query updated; UI behavior for incomplete link metadata will be covered by page-level tests. |
| Observability Gate (RECOMMENDED) | **PASS** | Existing create-vote request logging retained; no new sensitive fields introduced for logs. |
| Docker Reproducibility Gate (RECOMMENDED) | **PASS** | No Dockerfile/compose changes required; validated by existing build/test flow. |
| Performance Gate (RECOMMENDED) | **PASS** | Feature is string composition + rendering change only, no additional backend I/O. |

### Post-Design Re-evaluation

| Gate | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| TypeScript Contract Gate (MANDATORY) | **PASS** | `contracts/create-vote-redirect.schema.ts` defines redirect query shape used by server action/page. |
| Supabase Security Gate (MANDATORY) | **PASS** | Design keeps all security boundaries unchanged; no additional exposure beyond existing success context. |
| Test Gate (MANDATORY) | **PASS** | Validation paths explicitly listed in quickstart and test commands for regression confirmation. |

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/006-share-vote-link/
├── plan.md
├── research.md
├── data-model.md
├── quickstart.md
├── contracts/
│   ├── create-vote-redirect.schema.ts
│   └── create-vote-success-ui-contract.md
└── tasks.md             # Created later by /speckit.tasks
```

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
app/
└── votes/
  └── create/
    ├── actions.ts                     # build redirect params incl voteUrl
    ├── page.tsx                       # render success/error states based on params
    └── copy-result-url-button.tsx     # reusable copy button label support

src/
└── lib/
  └── vote/
    └── token.ts                       # existing canonical URL builder reference behavior

tests/
└── integration/
  └── vote-create.integration.test.ts    # redirect query regression
```

**Structure Decision**: Keep single-project Next.js layout. Feature is constrained to create-flow
server action + create page rendering and related integration regression tests. No DB migration,
no new API route, and no additional package required.

## Complexity Tracking

No constitution violations and no Deadline Waiver required.

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| Generate voting URL from `APP_URL` canonical origin | Ensures shared links are stable across proxy/request-origin variations and align with clarified requirement. |
| Reuse copy button component via configurable label | Keeps UX consistent while avoiding duplicate button implementations. |
| Hide success panel on incomplete link metadata + show generic error | Prevents misleading partial-success UI and matches clarified failure behavior. |
